stack.title: What is LIFO?
options: Last In, First Out - the last element added is the first to be removed
Linear Input, Final Output - elements are processed in linear order

queue.title: What is FIFO?
options: Fast Input, Fast Output - elements are processed at high speed
First In, First Out - the first element added is the first to be removed

feedback.completed: Great job! You've completed the Stack!
